---
title: "David Nobles"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/davidnobles-eng
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/david-nobles
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:david.nobles@sontric.org
---

Electrical engineer with 8+ years of experience across power systems,
inverter validation, battery energy storage applications, and engineering
consulting.  
  
My work bridges rigorous electrical analysis with modern software
practices, using tools like Python, Linux, GitHub Actions, Pytest, LabVIEW,
TestStand, Power BI, and MySQL to build automated, auditable workflows for
testing, reporting, design review, and production decision support.

## Publications

- **[Hardware-in-the-Loop Simulation, Control, and Validation of Battery Inverter Characteristics Through the IBR Control Hardware](https://wprcarchives.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Magnago_Henrique_HardwareLoopSimulation_FC_20220909.pdf)** — presented at the Western Protective Relay Conference, 2022.
